SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:34 am

Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Guobiao Zhu appears in pro per. Respondent, Liang Zhao appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lieberman.

EXHR (A) Police report and hospital invoices
EXHR (B) Statement of facts
EXHA (1) Statement of facts

9:48am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Judgment Entered
